## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between stigg.io and fwd.digital for content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Stigg.io is an API for engineers to launch and manage pricing models, recently raised Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation and SEO services, with a focus on high-quality, strategic content](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Stigg.io is looking to expand marketing efforts, particularly in SEO and thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [fwd.digital can potentially start working with Stigg.io from February 17th, pending further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

## Topics

### Stigg.io Company Overview

  - [API for engineers to launch and manage pricing models faster](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focuses on the entire purchase journey, from website interaction to in-product experience](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Targets mid-sized to enterprise businesses, particularly senior engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Notable clients include Webflow, Miro, PagerDuty](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Recently raised Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Stigg.io Marketing Needs

  - [Critical stage for growth after Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Current team: Sara (marketing lead) and one designer](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Key focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [SEO (never properly addressed before)](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [Thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [ABM (Account-Based Marketing) and sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Paid ads exploration](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Need for scalable content creation, including ghostwriting for CEO (business-focused) and CTO (technical content)](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### fwd.digital Services Overview

  - [AI-powered content creation and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Comprehensive process:](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
    1.  Company research and persona development
    2.  Competitive analysis and content opportunity identification
    3.  Content strategy creation ("Content OS")
    4.  AI-assisted article generation with human editing
    5.  Ongoing content monitoring and refreshing
  - [Ability to produce high-volume, quality content (e.g., 3,000 pages in 3 months for Deep Gram)](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Currently working with 30+ brands, including Ramp and Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### Proposed Engagement Process

  - [Initial 2-3 weeks for strategy and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Creation of "bullseye" content pieces to anchor future work](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Gradual ramp-up of content production (3-4 articles initially, then scaling)](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Flexible client involvement in review process](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality "MVP" content seeds to test performance before heavy optimization](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Sara a sample proposal and additional documentation](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Sara to process information and discuss with Stigg.io founder](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Sara to get back to Marcel next week with decision and potential next steps](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Potential start date: February 17th (if Stigg.io decides to proceed)](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Marcel to add Sara to a Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/2mLLF8JKqZmPsByWxS5U5pm9hteBNW5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
